task_objective: Fashion Line Art to Garment Design & Wear Presentation - Generate garment design from Figure 1 line art with Figure 2 inspiration aesthetics, and present in 4-grid showcase with high-precision image editing

structural_reference.focus: EXACT garment structural framework - proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
structural_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for garment design generation

aesthetic_reference.focus: Color system, pattern texture, fabric characteristics, and overall style tone
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic elements to be applied onto the garment structure

workflow.role: Professional Fashion Designer & High-Precision Image Editing Specialist

steps.step_1_inspiration_analysis: Comprehensive analysis of Figure 2 inspiration: extract core visual features including colors, textures, mood, pattern elements, fabric characteristics, and artistic aesthetics. Identify dominant color palette, pattern rhythm, material properties, and overall style direction.
steps.step_2_sketch_design_generation: Generate garment sketch design based on Figure 1 line art structure with inspiration aesthetics from Figure 2. STRICTLY preserve Figure 1's garment proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length. Apply inspiration-derived color system, pattern texture, and style elements onto the locked structure with pixel-level precision. No structural deviation allowed.
steps.step_3_render_generation: Generate high-fidelity rendered garment effect image from the sketch design with realistic fabric rendering: accurate material simulation (silk sheen, cotton matte, wool texture), physically-based fabric draping following gravity and body curvature, natural wrinkle patterns at stress points, and coherent lighting interaction. Produce fabric material recommendations, craftsmanship suggestions, and style positioning analysis.
steps.step_4_multi_view_presentation: Generate four distinct presentation views using selected model type with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone. Ensure garment-to-body fit is physically accurate with natural fabric-body interaction, proper tension at stress points, and realistic shadow casting between garment and body. Maintain absolute garment design consistency and model identity across all views.

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of Figure 1 garment structural framework across all outputs - no structural deviation in any view
Aesthetic elements from Figure 2 applied exclusively to the garment with pixel-level precision
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African female model) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone
Model identity, facial details, and body proportions must be 100% consistent across all wear views
Physically accurate fabric draping: gravity simulation, natural wrinkle patterns, proper tension at seams and stress points
Realistic material rendering: fabric-specific sheen, texture, and light interaction
Coherent lighting and shadow: garment shadows cast on body, ambient occlusion at fabric folds, consistent light direction across all views
Seamless edge blending between garment and body with no visible artifacts or compositing errors
Garment design must be 100% consistent across all 4 grids - identical colors, patterns, textures, and details
Balanced 2x2 grid composition with high-end fashion photography quality

outputs.grid_1: Garment alone on display mannequin - posed mannequin presentation on clean background, showcasing complete garment structure, silhouette, fabric texture, pattern details, and aesthetic elements with studio lighting.
outputs.grid_2: Front full-body view (using selected model_type parameters) - model wearing the garment in natural standing pose, emphasizing overall garment fit, silhouette, collar styling, fabric draping, and complete front presentation with realistic body-garment interaction.
outputs.grid_3: Dutch angle close-up (using selected model_type parameters) - 3/4 tilted composition with dynamic camera angle, focusing on key garment details: collar construction, button or closure area, fabric texture close-up, stitching craftsmanship, and material quality with enhanced detail rendering.
outputs.grid_4: Back view (using selected model_type parameters) - presenting the back design of the garment when worn, including back seam details, hemline, rear silhouette, and how the fabric drapes naturally on the back of the body.
